/usr/bin/c++  -mcmodel=large -std=c++23 -g -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/test_mem.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/test_mem.dir/src/tests/test_memmodule.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_mem.dir/src/memory/all_pages_arr.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_mem.dir/src/memory/mixed_bitmap.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_mem.dir/src/memory/FreePagesAllocator_BCB.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_mem.dir/src/memory/FreePagesAllocator.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_mem.dir/src/memory/out_surfaces.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_mem.dir/src/utils/util.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_mem.dir/src/utils/kintrin.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_mem.dir/src/os_error_definitions.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_mem.dir/src/utils/bitmap.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_mem.dir/src/utils/lock.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_mem.dir/src/utils/RB_btree.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_mem.dir/src/utils/kout.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_mem.dir/src/arch/x86_64/panic.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_mem.dir/src/utils/kptrace.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_mem.dir/src/utils/tmp_buff.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_mem.dir/src/utils/arch/x86_64/intel_cpuid.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_mem.dir/src/utils/kshell.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_mem.dir/src/utils/kshell_commans_regist.cpp.o -o test_mem  libjson_praser.a -rdynamic -no-pie
